query:
SELECT
                oi.product_id,
                p.name AS product_name,
                oi.quantity,
                oi.reserved_qty,
                (oi.quantity - oi.reserved_qty) AS missing
            FROM order_items oi
            JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
            WHERE oi.order_id = $1
              AND oi.quantity > oi.reserved_qty
